metadata.description: Reusable Agent Skills for quantitative finance research, extracted from the Aria toolchain.

plugins.name: quant-research-skills
plugins.description: Skills that enforce research discipline for equity reports, factors, and strategy backtesting through evidence and deterministic validation gates.

plugins.name: app-engineering-skills
plugins.description: Skills that help the user build and enforce their own app-engineering conventions — a design system of their choosing — separate from the quant-research pipeline.
